headline: GM joins race to build batteries for AI data centers and the grid
summary: GM is developing an entirely new sodium-ion battery chemistry for use in everything from data centers to its own factories.

raw.headline: GM joins race to build batteries for AI data centers and the grid
raw.summary: GM is developing an entirely new sodium-ion battery chemistry for use in everything from data centers to its own factories.

headline: CEO Jim Farley outlines what Ford would like to see in new USMCA
summary: Jim Farley said the automaker is in heavy conversation with the Trump administration and governments of Canada and Mexico on a new USMCA pact.

raw.headline: CEO Jim Farley outlines what Ford would like to see in new USMCA
raw.summary: Jim Farley said the automaker is in heavy conversation with the Trump administration and governments of Canada and Mexico on a new USMCA pact.

headline: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla
summary: The R2 SUV is meant to transform Rivian from a niche EV manufacturer that sells luxury vehicles into a more mainstream brand like U.S. EV leader Tesla.

raw.headline: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla

headline: Forget Coding: David Sacks Says AI Infrastructure Boom Is Driving Demand For Blue-Collar Workers
summary: David Sacks says AI data center boom is driving shortage of electricians and fiber techs as Meta launches a $115M workforce training program.

raw.headline: Forget Coding: David Sacks Says AI Infrastructure Boom Is Driving Demand For Blue-Collar Workers

headline: Ford begins testing tech that will change Americans' minds about EVs
summary: The expiration of the $7,500 U.S. tax credit for electric vehicle purchases last year exposed cracks in the industry that had been masked by the government subsidy for over a decade. Demand that had been climbing, albeit almost agonizingly slowly, suddenly reversed course after the tax credits ...
